name: Laravel Queues & Jobs
description: Production-grade queue patterns for Laravel 13 (MySQL + Redis). Covers driver choice, job design (ShouldQueue, idempotency, serialisation), retry and failure handling, worker scaling and Supervisor config, Bus batching and chaining, queue testing, and when to adopt Horizon.

categories.name: Job Design
categories.description: ShouldQueue, IDs not models, idempotency, constructor vs handle

categories.name: Retry & Failure
categories.description: Tries and backoff, failed() method, transient vs permanent, FailOnTimeout

categories.name: Scaling & Workers
categories.description: Supervisor config, multi-queue priority, worker recycling

categories.name: Batching & Chaining
categories.description: Bus::batch vs Bus::chain, failure handling, chunking large sets

categories.name: Testing & Operations
categories.description: Queue::fake / Bus::fake, scheduled jobs, when to adopt Horizon
